since_last: 34% of 101 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.78%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.34% · BTC -1.91% · Gold -2.38% · Nasdaq100 -2.02%. 34% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.78%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.78%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.02%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -14.25%
cards.body: Leaders: GEV +5.24%, HON +4.74%, AVAV +4.60%, CBRS +4.06%, MU +3.21%. Laggards: TSLA -14.25%, CRNC -7.64%, GOOGL -6.70%, SYM -5.06%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.83% at $117.37
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.83% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
